name: octopus
description: Folder-native task and continuity system. Captures tasks, sessions, memory, and handoffs as plain markdown next to your work.
author: Alessandro Smedile

interface.longDescription: Folder-native task and continuity system. Any folder containing .octopus/activity.md becomes an activity with tasks, sessions, handoffs, and accumulated memory stored as plain markdown next to the work. CLI-driven (octopus / octo); cross-activity read and write verbs let agents work from any cwd.
defaultPrompt: Show me the current activity and any blocked tasks.
Start a session and capture this work as a task.
